locations.text: Collapsed worker apartments above a flooded transit trench.
Water treatment plant where intake filters pulse like lungs.
Subway maintenance tunnels with dead trains welded in place.
Sealed agricultural dome lit by failing growth lamps.
Municipal archive vault beneath a cracked courthouse.
Rusting shipyard drydock where cranes still move at night.
Biomedical lab annex quarantined behind welded blast doors.
Abandoned public school repurposed as a cult shelter.
Radio tower service complex above a storm-lashed ridge.
Cargo mag-rail depot where manifests keep rewriting themselves.
Hospital wing sealed after triage went feral.
Underground coolant station beneath the district reactor.
Funeral columbarium whose halls are mapped like a maze.
Canal lock control house surrounded by black water bloom.
Prefab refugee blocks built inside a gutted shopping hub.
Signal intelligence bunker with mirrored corridor loops.
Fuel storage farm where pressure alarms never stop.
Court-martial chamber converted into a detention pit.
Orbital elevator staging hall now serving as a slum market.
Waste incineration corridor network beneath the old city.
Transit police precinct sealed with riot foam and prayer chalk.
Cryogenic food warehouse where aisle lights sweep like search beams.
Storm-drain cathedral under the old financial quarter.
Atmospheric scrubber farm on the perimeter wall.
University physics annex with magnet coils still humming.
Drone assembly garage beneath the freight loop.
Botanical conservatory overrun by black vine growth.
Civil defense siren bunker connected to school basements.
Flooded subway platform converted into a refugee barter line.
Stacked container maze in a moonlit port terminal.
Data-center catacombs under a shuttered fintech tower.
Collapsed commuter bridge maintenance vault.
Observation chapel attached to a defunct hospice.
Quarantine ferry terminal with chained boarding gates.
Heliport service ring around a silent trauma hospital.
Factory clean-room wing now packed with bone totems.
Municipal cold-storage vault where IDs are nailed to doors.
Monorail switching yard with looping signal ghosts.
Emergency desal plant intake tunnels below the seawall.
Broadcast museum archive sealed after a mass trance event.
Collapsed courthouse parking decks turned into cult dorms.
Orbital cargo customs hall with drifting anti-grav crates.
Neighborhood crematorium annex running on backup generators.
Deep well pumping station beneath a dry reservoir.
Military preschool shelter under a disused barracks block.
Fiber relay trench network crossing the old riverbed.
Research aquarium with shattered tanks and black tide seepage.
Maglev service spine inside the finance district.
Collapsed grain silos converted into a ration market.
Border checkpoint dome where scanners still flag the living.

corruptions.text: Grotesques nest in ventilation shafts and strike from blind angles.
Stricken mobs surge in waves triggered by sound.
Darklings drift through shadow bands and extinguish weak lights.
Cultists run patrol liturgies backed by stolen military gear.
Arcanoids guard core machinery with copied human voices.
Mixed Stricken and Grotesques fight each other until prey appears.
Darkling scouts mark targets for a larger unseen pack.
Cultist engineers are grafting Arcanoids with ritual bonework.
An unknown anomaly manifests hostile duplicates of the team.
Grotesque breeders have converted storage rooms into hatch pits.
Stricken overseers retain tactical memory and coordinate flanks.
Darklings phase through Gates unless flooded with hard light.
Cult cells wear TYR-113 uniforms to pass as relief units.
Arcanoid maintenance swarms rebuild each other mid-combat.
Unknown fungal bloom converts corpses into signal beacons.
Grotesques are chained by cult handlers and released by bell tone.
Stricken medics inject improvised mutagens into fallen allies.
Darklings merge into a single mass inside blackout zones.
Arcanoids obey an obsolete factory doctrine marked purge-friendly.
Anomaly static forces all factions to hallucinate phantom enemies.
Grotesque leapers wear scavenged armor plates and ignore pain.
Stricken pilgrims march in formation toward loudspeakers.
Darklings nest inside coolant mist and strike at warm targets.
Cult morticians harvest marrow to power ritual batteries.
Arcanoid sentinels classify civilians as recyclable biomass.
Unknown spore clouds animate broken mannequins as decoys.
Grotesque tunnellers breach floors after any explosion.
Stricken wardens carry riot shields and drag captives away.
Darkling swarms ride power fluctuations from zone to zone.
Cult choirs induce panic checks before melee rushes.
Arcanoid dockhands rebuild barricades for enemy factions.
Anomaly rain leaves reflective puddles that spawn hostile echoes.
Grotesque spitters mark targets for pack ambushes.
Stricken fire teams use stolen breaching charges.
Darklings mimic radio chatter to split squads.
Cult logisticians distribute mutagen ampoules to allies.
Arcanoids form mobile shield walls around core nodes.
Unknown parasite puppets corpses while the host hides nearby.
Grotesque handlers deploy chained hounds into chokepoints.
Stricken surgeons stitch fallen enemies back into action.
Darkling elders create moving blackout fields.
Cult snare teams prioritize Gifted bloodlines.
Arcanoid repair priests chant maintenance liturgies over metal shrines.
Anomaly static randomly swaps friend-or-foe markers.
Grotesque broodcarriers burst into lesser forms when killed.
Stricken chemists weaponize local water supplies.
Darklings phase between mirrors and polished steel.
Cult enforcers wear shock collars linked to Arcanoid overseers.
Arcanoid swarms harvest spent ammo and fabricate spikes.
Unknown growth wraps Gates and births ambush tendrils.

twists.text: Command orders are machine-forged; extraction was never authorized.
A Gifted advisor embedded with the team is feeding both sides.
The survivor distress signal loops from a dead transmitter.
The local node intelligence is compromised but still pleading for help.
Cultists are guarding civilians because a worse threat is below.
The target artifact is a sealed Gifted child in cryostasis.
A trusted TYR-113 kill-code now triggers Arcanoid reinforcements.
Survivors are decoys grown by Darklings to lure rescue teams.
The mission map omits an entire lower level under active ritual.
A Gifted prisoner offers truth only if one operative is left behind.
The broadcasted quarantine breach was staged to clear evidence.
The enemy commander is a former squadmate listed as KIA.
The objective crate contains a living anomaly that mimics voices.
Power restoration awakens the very entity the team came to stop.
The evac beacon is real but belongs to a cult extraction cell.
A benign-looking archivist is the ritual anchor sustaining corruption.
Typhoon interference hides that the mission ended 12 hours ago.
The Gifted source of contamination is trying to cure it, not spread it.
Security footage is predictive rather than recorded.
The supposed safe zone is where corruption density is highest.
The operation was commissioned by a cult front posing as city relief.
Your extraction pilot is a Darkling mimic in a human shell.
The primary target is already dead; only its broadcast ghost remains.
A Gifted healer caused the outbreak while treating the first victims.
HQ is replaying yesterday's orders from a quarantined node.
Civilians in the holdout are voluntary cult initiates.
The reactor alarms are faked to hide a prisoner transfer.
Mission cameras are feeding your squad position to every faction.
The Arcanoid core believes TYR-113 was dissolved years ago.
A survivor child can command Grotesques by humming.
The map safe corridor is baited with proxy mines.
The supposed traitor is inoculated and trying to stop command.
All distress calls originate from your own comms beacon.
A cult chaplain carries valid TYR-113 command credentials.
The quarantine seal broke from inside the command bunker.
Darklings avoid one chamber because something worse is chained there.
The Gifted asset is drawing corruption away from a nearby district.
Your replacement squad was sent and never logged in.
Arcanoid fire-control marks the team as maintenance targets, not enemies.
The objective sample is human memory encoded in flesh.
A captured cultist is actually the original facility director.
Power loss is intentional to protect a hidden evacuation route.
The holdout zone is a ritual seal that fails if abandoned.
Command promised reinforcements that were reassigned to suppression duty.
The corruption source is in orbit and only mirrored on site.
One of the marked civilians is a dormant Arcanoid control key.
False bioscan signatures hide an intact Stricken command cell.
The distress transmitter is tied to a bomb dead-man switch.
A Gifted negotiator will stand down enemies for a blood price.
The facility AI replaced all timestamps with fabricated future dates.

escalations.text: A 9-round reactor purge countdown starts when the core door opens.
Rot spreads one zone per round from all hazard tiles.
Reinforcements enter from the farthest Gate every other round.
Emergency lighting fails in phases, reducing line of sight each round.
Security doors lock behind the team after each objective step.
Toxic floodwater rises and turns low zones into hazard terrain.
Ritual phase markers trigger stronger enemies at rounds 3, 6, and 9.
Extraction is denied until two remote relays are manually reset.
Arcanoid drones begin sealing exits with weld foam after first contact.
Distress sirens attract Stricken packs to all noisy zones.
Darkness storms pulse every round and teleport Darklings between Gates.
A kill-sat pass in 8 rounds will sterilize the whole district.
Cult bell tolls spawn fanatics unless shrines are disabled.
Communications collapse in 5 rounds; objective markers become hidden.
Unstable coolant vents ignite random zones each turn.
Grotesque broodmother awakens when any operative is downed.
False evacuation alerts force civilians to clog Gate chokepoints.
Containment shutters cycle every round, changing available routes.
Unknown anomaly rewinds one cleared zone back to hostile each round.
A storm surge will drown the site in 10 rounds unless pumps restart.
Every third round, all open Gates spawn one elite unit.
Backup generators fail sequentially, shrinking powered zones.
Corruption fog advances from outer edges by one zone each round.
Cult ward drums grant enemies bonus movement after round 4.
Arcanoid turrets wake in any zone where gunfire occurred.
Civilians panic-stampede through nearest chokepoint at midpoint.
A heat spike will ignite fuel lines in 7 rounds.
Darkling eclipse cycle halves visibility on odd rounds.
Reactor coolant leaks create new hazard tiles every turn.
Enemy command uplink upgrades reinforcements after round 5.
Ritual circles expand one ring per round unless disrupted.
Extraction coordinates drift each round due to signal jam.
Floodgates cycle open and closed, redrawing movement lanes.
Stricken frenzy triggers double activations after first boss death.
Arcanoid purge protocol locks one random door each turn.
Anomaly surge teleports objective crates to random zones.
Siren towers call additional hostiles until all are disabled.
Tremors collapse one traversable edge connection every two rounds.
Power conduits arc and deal damage in lit zones.
Cult signal beacon marks one operative for focused attacks each round.
Grotesque pheromone cloud attracts packs to wounded operatives.
Orbiting debris causes periodic comms blackouts and HUD loss.
Seal failure vents hallucinogenic gas into interior zones.
Automated shutters force alternating clockwise movement only.
A mercy window closes in 6 rounds, after which no civilians can be saved.
Darkling nests hatch additional swarms when lights are restored.
Unknown spores harden into barricades at round end.
The ritual moon phase empowers cult elites at rounds 2, 5, and 8.
Emergency channels collapse; objective hints stop updating after round 4.
A remote artillery lock computes strike pattern that lands in 9 rounds.

primaryObjectives.text: Recover the blackbox from the command terminal and transmit proof.
Escort three civilians from scattered zones to the holdout zone.
Destroy the ritual anchor before the third liturgy cycle.
Secure the reactor control room and stabilize core pressure.
Capture a live Arcanoid unit for forensic extraction.
Extract a Gifted witness from the quarantine wing alive.
Burn all brood pits marked on the lower-level map.
Reactivate two relay towers to re-open orbital comms.
Seal the anomaly rift with calibrated node charges.
Retrieve the antidote canister from the contaminated pharmacy.
Hold the control bridge for six rounds against incoming waves.
Disrupt the cult broadcast by destroying three signal altars.
Rescue the trapped maintenance crew in the locked tunnel sector.
Recover TYR-113 encryption keys from the archive vault.
Neutralize the Stricken overseer directing the horde.
Deliver fusion cells to the evacuation tram and launch it.
Map and clear a safe route across all Gate-linked zones.
Disable the auto-defense grid without triggering full lockdown.
Secure contaminated evidence crates before cult recovery teams arrive.
Extract with at least one intact sample of unknown biomass.
Upload clean firmware to the compromised security backbone.
Escort a reactor technician to three stabilization valves.
Destroy the broodmother cocoon before it hatches.
Extract the district registrar alive from cult custody.
Shut down the anomaly beacon on the rooftop array.
Recover evidence of command falsification from sealed archives.
Purge all ritual pylons anchoring the corruption field.
Restore tram power and evacuate survivors through Gate C.
Capture the Darkling alpha entity for containment.
Secure antidote production by holding the biolab mixers.
Reclaim and fortify the holdout zone for eight rounds.
Disable Arcanoid command uplink in the central control room.
Retrieve the Gifted cipher from the submerged chapel vault.
Clear and hold two extraction lanes simultaneously.
Destroy contaminated water pumps feeding the lower sectors.
Recover black-market vaccines before cult incineration teams arrive.
Install jammers on three hostile relay towers.
Locate and terminate the Stricken command medic.
Escort the final school shelter bus to the perimeter gate.
Contain the mirror anomaly by placing four anchor stakes.
Evacuate the court records proving the quarantine cover-up.
Rescue the embedded TYR-113 observer from a locked panic room.
Seize fuel reserves and ignite denial charges on withdrawal.
Trace and cut the cult underground supply tunnel.
Recover the orbital uplink dish core for reverse engineering.
Neutralize all Arcanoid repair nests in the maintenance tier.
Deliver a live sample to extraction without using fire damage.
Defend the comms mast while HQ transmits a citywide counter-signal.
Break open the quarantine ring and escort medical teams inside.
Secure the anomaly lens and bring it back intact.

secondaryObjectives.text: Keep power above 50 percent by holding auxiliary breakers.
Recover fallen squad tags from at least two red zones.
Silence all alarm nodes before extraction.
Prevent any civilian casualties during the operation.
Interrogate a captured cultist before round 6.
Purge every hazard tile in the control room sector.
Collect three anomaly readings from unstable zones.
Escort a wounded engineer who moves one zone per round.
Do not let Darklings extinguish the central floodlight.
Hack the sealed data locker in the side wing.
Destroy all cult shrines found on map edge zones.
Extract one live Stricken specimen for medical review.
Keep every Gate route open by removing barricade tokens.
Avoid triggering any auto-turret in secured sectors.
Complete mission without using incendiary munitions.
Find and secure the missing logistics manifest.
Protect a Gifted asset from direct damage.
Search every storage zone for hidden med caches.
Maintain radio contact with HQ at each timer checkpoint.
Tag at least four enemy bodies for retrieval.
Keep at least one generator active until extraction.
Recover two encrypted data slates from side sectors.
Prevent enemy use of rooftop sniper perches.
Tag every cult banner for intel analysis.
Do not allow any Arcanoid to escape off-map.
Stabilize three wounded civilians with field medkits.
Clear all hazard tiles from the primary route.
Hold the archive vestibule for two consecutive rounds.
Keep squad stress below panic threshold throughout mission.
Disable at least one spawn Gate with demolition charges.
Secure one intact Darkling specimen vial.
Recover lost drone parts for post-mission repair credits.
Complete mission with no downed operatives.
Unlock and loot the sealed armory cache.
Destroy all anomaly mirrors in interior zones.
Rescue trapped maintenance bots for goodwill with locals.
Avoid collateral damage in marked civilian blocks.
Identify the fake distress beacon before round 5.
Keep ritual chant volume below escalation threshold.
Carry a contaminated crate to extraction without dropping it.
Recover the old city map from the collapsed survey office.
Purge one brood tunnel with controlled charges.
Intercept cult courier before it reaches map edge.
Patch the comms repeater to restore long-range support.
Maintain visual contact with the Gifted asset each round.
Close every blast shutter after passing through.
Spend no command points in the first three rounds.
Search two optional zones for ration pallets.
Mark unstable flooring to prevent future civilian casualties.
Retrieve one personal item from each named casualty.

enemyMixHints.text: Frontline Stricken with Darklings flanking through blackout zones.
Cultist rifle pairs screened by cheap Grotesque chargers.
Arcanoid sentries hold chokepoints while Stricken swarm behind.
Mostly Darklings until ritual phase, then elite Cultists arrive.
Grotesque ambushers dominate vents with one hulking broodguard.
Anomaly echoes spawn decoy enemies before real contacts appear.
Heavy Arcanoids in control rooms, light drones on approach lanes.
Stricken rushers backed by bile-spitting support variants.
Cult melee fanatics escorted by one Gifted defector.
Darklings and Arcanoids cooperate under unknown command logic.
Grotesque packs share space with dormant Arcanoids that wake on noise.
Low enemy count early, then surge from map edge Gates.
Cult snipers hold long lanes while Stricken pin in close quarters.
Arcanoid med-units revive downed hostiles if not destroyed first.
Darklings ignore civilians and prioritize powered machinery.
Anomaly-spawned mirrors copy whichever enemy was last slain.
Grotesque tunnelers pop up behind the team after each objective step.
Stricken command cadre uses shields and coordinated suppressive fire.
Cult engineers deploy improvised mines around ritual nodes.
Arcanoid harvesters attempt to drag corpses off-map.
Stricken vanguard with Arcanoid overwatch from elevated lanes.
Cult shield bearers fronting Darkling skirmishers.
Grotesque bruisers backed by anomaly decoy swarms.
Arcanoid breachers pair with cult spotters and trap teams.
Darklings dominate early turns, then Stricken heavies arrive.
Mostly cult rifles until ritual phase unlocks elite fanatics.
Grotesque burrowers appear behind loud weapons.
Arcanoid scouts kite while repair units resurrect them.
Stricken shock troops with one commander granting extra actions.
Darkling stalkers travel through vents and ceiling lines.
Cult sappers seed chokepoints with mines before engaging.
Anomaly phantoms mirror the highest-damage enemy type.
Grotesque spitters deny cover while chargers force movement.
Arcanoid snipers pin open lanes as drones flank.
Stricken berserkers rush objectives while ranged units guard exits.
Cult zealots protect Arcanoid cores at all costs.
Darkling packs scatter under light then regroup at blackout edges.
Mixed low-tier hostiles until a single elite hunter is revealed.
Grotesque handlers coordinate with cult horn signals.
Arcanoid suppressors prioritize whoever carries mission items.
Stricken medics revive melee units in the backline.
Cult infiltrators disguise as civilians until alarm trigger.
Darkling sentries ignore armor and chase isolated targets.
Anomaly entities copy squad movement patterns.
Grotesque hounds screen a slow-moving brood titan.
Arcanoid riot teams advance in paired shield formations.
Stricken gunline collapses into melee when commander falls.
Cult flamers force displacement into Darkling ambush corridors.
Anomaly spores spawn weak adds from every corpse.
Machine cultists field hybrid Arcanoid exo-suits.

mapNotes.text: Two central Gates form a lethal chokepoint with blocked line of sight.
Control room overlooks three zones but doors can only open from inside.
Holdout zone has hard cover but only one narrow exit Gate.
North route is shorter but filled with hazard tiles and dead ends.
South route loops wider with multiple flank paths and soft cover.
Collapsed corridor blocks direct LoS across the midline until cleared.
Service ladders allow vertical bypass between outer and inner rings.
Ritual chamber is a dead-end zone with two spawn Gates.
Power relay zones can be captured to disable nearby security doors.
Waterlogged sector slows movement unless pumps are activated.
Outer catwalk grants long LoS but has no hard cover.
Cargo lifts link two distant zones but reset every other round.
Gate shutters create alternating open and blocked lanes.
Debris fields provide cover and conceal hidden Grotesque burrows.
A maintenance crawlspace bypasses the main chokepoint for small units.
Central atrium has clear sightlines but spawns from all four edges.
Control consoles in side rooms can lock or unlock adjacent Gates.
Extraction pad is exposed and requires two-turn stabilization.
Vent passages allow Darklings to ignore blocked Gate rules.
Hazard steam bursts trigger in predictable 3-round cycles.
Primary objective sits in a central zone with three entering Gates.
Service corridor provides stealth route but blocks heavy units.
Outer ring offers speed with zero hard cover.
Inner ring has dense cover and frequent spawn nodes.
Control booth can reroute power to open one sealed lane.
Collapsed stairwell creates one-way movement into the lower tier.
Flood channels split the map unless bridge switches are held.
Rooftop path bypasses chokepoints but exposes long sightlines.
Ritual dais counts as difficult terrain and amplifies cult spawns.
Broken tram cars form movable cover if pushed.
Two side loops reconnect near extraction for late flanks.
Central generator room emits hazard pulses every third round.
Sewer bypass links opposite corners through narrow crawl zones.
Gate A and Gate D share a linked lock console.
Dead reactor hall grants hard cover but constant chip damage.
Archive stacks create high cover and blind corner fights.
Vent lanes connect rear objectives for Darkling movement.
Extraction zone starts inactive until two switches are held.
Debris slope blocks return movement once descended.
Observation deck grants perfect line of sight to midline.
Holdout zone has medical station but no nearby escape route.
Cargo crane can reposition one crate token per round.
Map edge fog conceals approaching reinforcements for one round.
Cult shrine rooms are optional but shorten reinforcement path if ignored.
Maintenance office contains lock override for all shutters.
Water turbine chamber rotates safe tiles each round.
Narrow tunnel network favors melee and limits grenade arcs.
Skybridge crossing can be destroyed to cut enemy pursuit.
Objective vault door needs simultaneous interaction from two zones.
Sublevel prison cells hide civilians, loot, or ambushes.

rewardsConsequences.text: Success grants one prototype weapon mod; failure triggers district lockdown.
Save the civilians to gain faction support; lose them and morale collapses.
If the ritual anchor falls, corruption growth pauses for one campaign turn.
Recovering the blackbox unlocks an intel reroll in the next mission.
Arcanoid capture grants tech salvage but increases machine hostility later.
Extract the Gifted alive for bonus resources, but cult pursuit intensifies.
Destroy all brood pits to reduce Grotesque spawns next operation.
Failing containment adds persistent hazard tiles to the regional map.
Completing under timer grants command trust and one extra supply draw.
Missing extraction window forces a costly emergency pickup.
Securing encryption keys reveals hidden routes in a future map.
If a relay stays active, Darkling presence spreads to adjacent sectors.
Preserving facility power provides free gear repair between missions.
Collateral damage above threshold turns locals hostile.
Documented anomaly samples unlock experimental countermeasure cards.
Losing the witness erases one active lead from campaign logs.
Purging all shrines reduces cult reinforcement rolls next mission.
If the reactor scrams, regional power shortages raise future timers.
Recovering medical caches grants one free revive kit.
Leaving evidence behind allows command to deny the incident publicly.
If uplink is restored, future missions start with one free scout ping.
Failing civilian escort adds unrest penalties in urban districts.
Destroying the beacon reduces anomaly events for one cycle.
Leaving ritual pylons intact increases cult threat rating.
Recovering clean water grants bonus medical supplies.
Arcanoid core salvage unlocks one temporary drone ally.
Missing the timer causes command to reduce deployment budget.
Rescuing the registrar reveals black-market route choices next mission.
If holdout survives, gain one extra reinforcement token.
Failure to contain spores adds persistent hazard markers to adjacent maps.
Capturing a Darkling specimen enables anti-shadow munitions.
Collateral fires reduce local support and increase prices.
Securing archive proof grants a free objective reroll next operation.
If the reactor is stabilized, future industrial maps lose one escalation step.
Losing the Gifted asset closes one diplomacy branch.
Destroying brood nests lowers Grotesque boss chance next mission.
If any cult courier escapes, enemy intel improves against your squad.
Completing all secondaries grants one veteran perk pick.
Failing to tag evidence lets command rewrite the incident report.
Saving maintenance bots unlocks discounted gear repairs.
If extraction is delayed, one random operative starts next mission fatigued.
Recovering signal hardware grants improved comms range campaign-wide.
Allowing quarantine breach spreads Stricken encounters to nearby sectors.
Purging mirror nodes reduces anomaly duplication effects.
Securing ration stores grants one free supply cache in the next map.
If the chapel falls, cult morale shatters and recruitment drops.
Failing to evacuate records removes one future lore objective.
Collecting all data slates unlocks prototype tactical cards.
Ignoring flooded pumps causes recurring movement penalties in canal zones.
Successful silent run grants bonus reputation with resistance cells.
